# UX Build Handoff — unified-control-center

**Feature:** unified-control-center
**Date generated:** 2026-04-26
**Generated by:** Phase 3 Step 3f (`/ux prompt`)
**Reads from:** [`.claude/features/unified-control-center/ux-spec.md`](../../.claude/features/unified-control-center/ux-spec.md), [`prd.md`](../../.claude/features/unified-control-center/prd.md), [`research.md`](../../.claude/features/unified-control-center/research.md)
**Companion prompt:** `2026-04-26-unified-control-center-design-build.md` (covers visual implementation)

---

## What you're building

The "unified-control-center" is a private operator dashboard rendered as `/control-room/*` routes inside the public fitme-story Next.js 16 site at https://fitme-story.vercel.app. It replaces the standalone Astro dashboard at https://fit-tracker2.vercel.app. **Single user (Regev)** is the only operator. Daily workflow: log in via basic-auth → load `/control-room` → identify next blocker or shipping decision → act. **Time-to-Confidence target: ≤6 seconds.**

The dashboard MUST become invisible to outside sources when product launches (3-layer blind-switch in PRD §6) AND the codebase MUST stay ready for future extraction back to a standalone internal-only deployment (PRD §7).

## Tasks (UX-build scope only — visual scope is in the companion design-build prompt)

### 1. Routes (Next.js App Router)

Create these routes:

- `src/app/control-room/layout.tsx` — wraps all dashboard routes; renders `SiteHeader` + `ControlRoomTabNav` + main slot + `SiteFooter` + `DataFreshnessFooter`
- `src/app/control-room/page.tsx` — overview (Hero + NumbersPanel + AlertsBanner + CurrentPhaseSummary + RecentActivity + EnforcementLayers + ClassBGaps)
- `src/app/control-room/board/page.tsx` — KanbanBoard with 10 phase columns
- `src/app/control-room/table/page.tsx` — TanStack Table with filter bar + virtualized rows
- `src/app/control-room/knowledge/page.tsx` — KnowledgeHub with grouped Disclosure docs

### 2. Auth gate (PRD §6)

`src/middleware.ts` — matcher = `/control-room/:path*` ONLY (showcase stays public). Read `DASHBOARD_PUBLIC` env var: if `true`, allow; if `false` (default), require basic-auth via `DASHBOARD_USER` + `DASHBOARD_PASS` env vars.

### 3. Sitemap + robots exclusion (PRD §6.2 — unconditional)

- Update `src/app/sitemap.ts` to never include `/control-room/*`
- Update `src/app/robots.ts` to add `Disallow: /control-room`

### 4. Build inclusion flag (PRD §6.3)

- `next.config.ts` reads `DASHBOARD_BUILD` env var (default `true`)
- If `false`: rewrite `/control-room/:path*` → `/404` AND apply webpack `IgnorePlugin` to drop dashboard bundles

### 5. Data sync (Pattern 4.b — PRD §11)

Inline (no published package — Q2 = A):

- `fitme-story/scripts/sync-from-fittracker2.ts` reads `../FitTracker2/.claude/shared/*.json` + `../FitTracker2/.claude/features/*/state.json`, writes to `fitme-story/src/data/shared/` + `fitme-story/src/data/features/`, and writes `fitme-story/src/data/freshness.json` with sync timestamp
- `package.json` adds `"prebuild": "tsx scripts/sync-from-fittracker2.ts"`
- `vercel.json` build command does shallow-clone of FitTracker2 with deploy key, then runs `npm run build` (which triggers prebuild → sync → build)

### 6. View persistence (Q3 = A)

- `src/lib/control-room/use-persisted-state.ts` — hook reading/writing `localStorage["control-room:view"]` + `["control-room:filters"]`
- Honor `?reset=true` URL param to clear persisted state

### 7. Command palette (Q3 = yes — Cmd+K)

- `src/components/control-room/CommandPalette.tsx` — uses `cmdk` library + Radix Dialog
- Sections: Recent (top 5 from `localStorage["control-room:palette:recents"]`), Commands (g o / g b / g t / g k / Cmd+Shift+L / Cmd+Shift+R / etc.), Features (fuzzy match against feature-registry), Linear Issues (fuzzy match against synced Linear data)
- Mounted globally in `src/app/control-room/layout.tsx`; opens on Cmd+K, closes on Esc

### 8. Component port + new components

Per the spec § 4 inventory:

**Reuse verbatim (6):**
- `Hero` from `src/components/home/Hero.tsx`
- `NumbersPanel` from `src/components/home/NumbersPanel.tsx`
- `MetricsCard` from `src/components/mdx/MetricsCard.tsx`
- `Disclosure` from `src/components/ui/Disclosure.tsx`
- `SiteHeader`, `SiteFooter`

**Port + restyle (8) — under `src/components/control-room/`:**
- `AlertsBanner.tsx` (port from `dashboard/src/components/AlertsBanner.jsx`)
- `Kanban.tsx` (port `KanbanBoard.jsx`, add keyboard drag pattern: focus card → Space lift → arrow target → Space drop → Esc cancel; announce all transitions to screen reader)
- `FeatureTable.tsx` (port `TableView.jsx` to TanStack Table v8)
- `KnowledgeHubGroups.tsx` (port `KnowledgeHub.jsx`; reuse Disclosure)
- `SourceHealth.tsx` (port; folded into NumbersPanel KPI grid item)
- `FeatureCard.tsx`, `TaskCard.tsx`, `ThemeToggle.tsx` (use fitme-story dark-mode hook)
- `primitives.tsx` (port `controlCenterPrimitives.jsx`: Panel, MetricList, etc.)

**New (8) — under `src/components/control-room/`:**
- `ControlRoomTabNav.tsx` — top tab nav
- `CurrentPhaseSummary.tsx` — overview's phase rollup
- `RecentActivity.tsx` — change-log feed (collapsed by default)
- `EnforcementLayers.tsx` — v7.6 4-layer status cards
- `ClassBGaps.tsx` — 5-gap inventory cards
- `DataFreshnessFooter.tsx` — reads `freshness.json`, color-codes age
- `CommandPalette.tsx` — Cmd+K overlay
- `FeatureSidePanel.tsx` — drill-down side panel from right (200ms slide-in)

### 9. Data layer — ported parsers

Under `src/lib/control-room/`:

- `builder.ts` (port `dashboard/src/scripts/builders/controlCenter.js` — TypeScript)
- 7 parser files: `state.ts`, `tasks.ts`, `unified.ts`, `backlog.ts`, `metrics.ts`, `prd.ts`, `roadmap.ts`
- `github.ts` (preserved fetch logic, requires `GITHUB_TOKEN` env)

All must read from `src/data/shared/` and `src/data/features/` (synced by step 5).

### 10. Empty / loading / error states

Implement per spec § 2.4 for every screen. Specifically:

- Empty state for KPI when value is 0 → muted text + helpful next-action link
- Skeleton loaders matching layout shape on first paint
- Stale-data footer turns yellow >2h, red >6h
- Sync error toast at top + cached snapshot fallback

### 11. Accessibility (WCAG AA)

Every interactive element:

- Reachable via keyboard
- Announced correctly by screen reader (use `aria-label`, `role="status"`, `aria-live` per spec § 7)
- 32px minimum target size
- Focus ring 2px `var(--color-brand-indigo)`
- Color is never the sole signal — every status pill has icon + text

### 12. Co-location rule (PRD §7.1)

Everything dashboard-specific lives under one of:
- `src/app/control-room/*`
- `src/components/control-room/*`
- `src/lib/control-room/*`
- `scripts/sync-from-fittracker2.ts`
- `src/middleware.ts`

NOTHING else. ESLint rule (T13) enforces no-reverse-imports.

### 13. ESLint rule

Add to `eslint.config.mjs`:
```js
{
  files: ['src/components/!(control-room)/**/*', 'src/app/!(control-room)/**/*'],
  rules: {
    'no-restricted-imports': ['error', {
      patterns: [{ group: ['*/control-room/*'], message: 'Showcase code must not import dashboard code (PRD §7.2 — extraction-ready rule).' }],
    }],
  },
}
```

### 14. Verification scripts

- `scripts/verify-blind-switch.sh` (PRD §6.5): 5 acceptance assertions (sitemap excludes, robots disallow, 401 with `DASHBOARD_PUBLIC=false`, 200 with valid auth, 404 with `DASHBOARD_BUILD=false`)
- CI job runs the verify script on every PR touching control-room/middleware/sitemap files

### 15. Tests (T6, T11, T33, T38)

- Sync script unit test (mock filesystem)
- `verify-blind-switch.sh` test
- All 5 dashboard test files ported to vitest under `src/lib/control-room/__tests__/`
- Analytics unit tests for 8 GA4 events (`MockAnalyticsAdapter` web equivalent)

## What you're NOT doing (clarifications for the implementation agent)

- Not redesigning showcase pages (Phase 0 already locked: only `/control-room/*` routes change)
- Not building real-time updates (data is build-time only; refresh = redeploy)
- Not adding new external integrations (Linear, Notion, GitHub, Vercel sources are read-only from existing data)
- Not building mobile-first (responsive-aware but desktop-primary)
- Not implementing multi-operator auth (basic-auth only; defer Clerk/NextAuth to v2)
- Not creating a `/control-room/preview` route (Q4 = A — security smell)

## Success criteria

You're done when:

1. All 4 routes render without console errors under React 19 strict mode
2. KanbanBoard supports both drag-drop AND keyboard drag (PRD §6 FR-2 + WCAG)
3. TableView supports sort + filter + localStorage persistence (PRD FR-3)
4. KnowledgeHub reuses Disclosure for collapse/expand (FR-4)
5. All 4 source-health indicators visible in NumbersPanel (FR-5)
6. Blind-switch verify script passes locally + CI (FR-6)
7. Sync script works locally (`npm run prebuild && npm run dev`) AND on Vercel (FR-7)
8. DataFreshnessFooter shows `freshness.json` age with color (FR-8)
9. Every visible quantitative claim has its tier tag in the data layer (FR-9)
10. Dark mode passes WCAG AA on all components (FR-10) — T16 audit
11. ESLint rule blocks reverse imports
12. `EXTRACTION-RECIPE.md` is in repo + CI extraction-verification job exists (T39)

## Acceptance handoff

When the implementation is done, hand back to `/qa` with:
- Test report (vitest + Playwright e2e)
- Lighthouse + axe MCP audit report
- Time-to-Confidence measurement on local dev (target ≤6s p50; baseline must be measured first per T1+T2)
- `verify-blind-switch.sh` passing in CI
- Pull request with all changes co-located under control-room/* paths
